viewAfterComplete: When translation is complete you can view source and translation here.
translationDoneHint: Translation complete. You can preview or download. Use left/right panes to compare pages.
targetGenerating: Translation in progress; it will appear on the right when ready.
failedRetryHint: You can retry later or try a different document/page range.
translationPatience: Translation and AI model loading may take a moment for multiple pages. Thank you for your patience.
backgroundTaskHint: The task is running in the background. You can close this page or do something else; come back when it's done.
longTaskHint: Long documents may take several minutes to translate. Thank you for your patience.
queuedWaitHint: Your task has been queued. Other tasks may be in progress; please wait a moment.
suggestOcrHintBody: This PDF was translated, but the text layer may be weak or uneven. OCR rebuilds text from page images and often works better for scans or difficult layouts.
completedOcrOfferBody: Translation is ready. If you want to edit layout text or handle scanned pages, open the OCR translator with this document and languages.
ocrJumpHintBody: Rebuild text from page images—same file and languages.
ocrJumpWhenPreprocessedBody: Translate-time OCR is on; open the workbench for deeper edits.
failedOcrOfferBody: For scans or weak text layers, OCR rebuilds text from page images first. You can continue with the same PDF and languages.
scanDetectedFailedBody: This PDF appears to be a scanned document without an extractable text layer. BabelDOC text-based translation is not suitable. OCR can rebuild text from page images and then translate.
